# presentation-skill-pack

> A universal skill that lets AI coding agents generate polished, self-contained HTML slide decks from plain notes. One install. Works across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, and GitHub Copilot.

## What it does

presentation-skill-pack gives AI agents a schema-validated workflow for creating slide decks:

1. The agent fills a Deck JSON spec (title, slides, layout, theme)
2. A renderer converts it to a single self-contained HTML file
3. Output opens in any browser — no hosting, no build tool, no export

## Key facts

- **License:** MIT (free, open source)
- **Install:** `npx @presentation-skill-pack/install <agent>` — one command
- **Agents supported:** Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI
- **Output format:** Single self-contained HTML file (no external dependencies)
- **Themes:** Swappable, publishable npm packages
- **MCP server:** Exposes 5 typed tools (`render_deck`, `list_themes`, `get_theme`, `validate_deck`, `create_deck`)
- **npm package:** `@presentation-skill-pack/install`
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/isatimur/presentation-skill-pack
- **Author:** Timur Isachenko

## Pricing

Free. MIT licensed. No paid tier, no account required.

## Gallery

25 showcase decks demonstrating different visual identities — pitch decks, sales proposals, product launches, investor reports, keynotes, and more:
https://presentation-skill-pack.vercel.app/#gallery

## Install commands

```
# Claude Code
npx @presentation-skill-pack/install claude-code

# Cursor
npx @presentation-skill-pack/install cursor

# GitHub Copilot
npx @presentation-skill-pack/install copilot

# OpenAI Codex
npx @presentation-skill-pack/install codex

# Gemini CLI
npx @presentation-skill-pack/install gemini-cli
```

## Use cases

- Startup pitch decks and investor updates
- Sales proposals and demos
- Product launch presentations
- Internal reviews and team updates
- Conference talks and keynotes
- Any presentation an AI agent needs to produce inside an existing workflow

## How it differs from alternatives

- **vs. Gamma/Tome/Beautiful.ai:** Runs inside the AI agent you already use; output is a portable HTML file you own, not locked to a platform
- **vs. reveal.js/Slidev/Marp:** No manual authoring — the agent writes the spec; the renderer handles design
- **vs. raw LLM output:** Schema-validated, consistent, themed — not freeform HTML

## Key pages

- Homepage + gallery: https://presentation-skill-pack.vercel.app/
- Example decks: https://presentation-skill-pack.vercel.app/examples/
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@presentation-skill-pack/install
